title: WOLVERINE 18-Sheet 60 Mins Running Time Cross Cut High Security Level P-4 Heavy Duty Paper/CD/Card Ultra Quiet Shredder for Home Office with 22-Litre Pullout Waste Bin SD9113(Black)
features: CROSS-CUT SECURITY LEVEL P-4 to secure confidential information. Shreds max 18-sheet paper/staples/clips into particles measuring 4 mm x 35 mm; also shreds CD and Credit Card. The blades will cut each disc into three pieces
CONTINUOUS RUNNING TIME UPTO 60 MINUTES supported by a patented cooling system
LOW NOISE LEVEL 58dB ultra-quiet performance; 22 Litre pull-out waste bin with large easy viewing transparent window
JAM REVERSE SYSTEM can automatically detect and clear paper jams
UKCA certified for safety; includes 1-year warranty
description: Product Description Previous page Automatic Jam Reverse System This paper shredder machine has an automatic jam reverse system to clear jams fast. Great for home office heavy duty use. Durable Steel Cutter for Heavy Duty Super alloy steel cutter with 40Cr gear and self-lubricant bearing shreds cards, clips, staples. Ideal industrial paper shredder designed for reliable heavy-duty performance. High-Speed, Long-Time Shredding With continuous running time up to 60 minutes and the ability to shred up to 8000 sheets in a working cycle, this shredder provides high-speed shredding at 6.6 ft/min, turning paper into tiny pieces. P-4 High-Security Crosscut Shredder Shreds up to 18 sheets at once, cutting paper into tiny particles (5/32" x 1-3/8"). Features a 6-gallon pull-out waste bin with a large, easy-view transparent window. Next page Ultra-Quiet Performance This shredder operates at an impressively low noise level of just 58dB, making it ideal for environments where minimal noise is essential. Enjoy a quiet shredding experience without disturbing the peace, whether in a home office or shared workspace. Overheat Protection Technology This shredder is equipped with overheat protection technology, which automatically stops the machine if it detects excessive heat. This feature not only ensures safe operation but also extends the lifespan of the shredder, providing added peace of mind. Specification Power 120V,60Hz Sheet Capacity 18 Sheets(75g) Cut Size 5/32" x 1-3/8" (4mm x 35mm) Shred Speed 6.6ft/min (2m/min) Max Continuous Working Time 60 min Waste Bin Capacity 6 Gallons (23L) Feed Entrance Width 8.7" (220mm) Product Dimension 13.4" x 10.4" x 22" Product Weight 26lbs WOLVERINE SD9113-Black Buying Options WOLVERINE SD9112A- BLACK Buying Options WOLVERINE SD9112A- White Add To Basket WOLVERINE SD9520A-BLACK Add To Basket WOLVERINE SD9101-White Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 67 4.5 out of 5 stars 463 4.3 out of 5 stars 405 4.4 out of 5 stars 346 4.3 out of 5 stars 405 Price £194.39 £ 194 . 39 £199.92 £ 199 . 92 £249.90 £ 249 . 90 £359.90 £ 359 . 90 £152.92 £ 152 . 92 Cutting capacity 18 10 10 15 8 Cutting type Cross-cut Super Mirco-cut Super Mirco-cut Super Mirco-cut Super Mirco-cut Cutting size 5/32" x 1-3/8" 3/32" x 15/32" 3/32" x 15/32" 3/32" X 13/32" 3/32" x 15/32" Security level P-4 P-5 P-5 P-5 P-5 Duty cycle (mins) 60 on 60 on 60 on 15 on 10 on Bin capacity 6 gallons 6 gallons 6 gallons 8 gallons 4.5 gallons Noise level 58dB 54dB 54dB 56dB 54dB
